leadText: The Black Augurite (Japanese: くろのきせき Black Augite) is a type of item introduced in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It allows Scyther to evolve into Kleavor.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Causes Scyther to evolve into Kleavor upon use. This consumes the Black Augurite.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description LA S V ZA A glassy black stone that produces a sharp cutting edge when split. It's loved by a certain Pokémon.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price LA $ 8,000 $ 500 ZA N/A $ 500 Effect [ edit | edit source ] Causes Scyther to evolve into Kleavor upon use. This consumes the Black Augurite. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description LA S V ZA A glassy black stone that produces a sharp cutting edge when split. It's loved by a certain Pokémon. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods LA Jubilife Village (reward for completing Request 68: "A Nosepass to Guide the Way") Held by wild Graveler (5% chance) Ginkgo Guild cart (randomly sold by Ginter , as "Jet-Black Rock") Sometimes found by Ursaluna Space-time distortions ZA MD Destroy Floating Poké Balls in 4 Star and 5 Star hyperspace wild zones with Item Power: Special

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Despite being unobtainable in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet , the Terarium has a deposit of Black Augurite in the Canyon Biome , with Kleavor and Scyther being able to spawn around it.
